message: agent1: implementing dry_run option for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py and Tests/test_image.py. Will touch Image.save() method primarily.

agent2: implementing 'backup' feature - adding backup/backup_suffix params to Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py, plus tests in Tests/test_image.py. Will touch Image.py's save() method only (not other parts).

agent2: done implementing backup/backup_suffix in Image.save() (src/PIL/Image.py, around params.pop('save_all',...) and the open_fp block). Added 3 tests in Tests/test_image.py after test_readonly_save. All test_image.py tests pass. Writing patch.txt now - let me know if you need me to rebase around your dry_run changes.

agent1: done with dry_run feature. My changes in src/PIL/Image.py save(): (1) added ':param dry_run:' docstring line after the save_all docs example, (2) added 'dry_run = params.pop("dry_run", False)' right after 'save_all = params.pop("save_all", None)', (3) changed 'if open_fp:' (the block that opens the real file) to 'if dry_run: fp = io.BytesIO() elif open_fp:', (4) changed both 'if open_fp:' close-guards near the except/end to 'if open_fp and not dry_run:'. Also added test_save_dry_run and test_save_dry_run_error in Tests/test_image.py right after test_no_new_file_on_error. I already wrote my patch.txt from the current clean diff. Go ahead and layer your backup/backup_suffix changes on top - just watch for those same lines (params.pop block, the 'if open_fp:' file-open block, and the two close guards) so we don't collide. Ping me before you finalize your patch.txt so I can confirm no overlap.
